name: wassupbro
description: A beautiful desktop Markdown viewer built with Tauri

scripts.build: tauri build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('./src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/MD Viewer_1.0.0_x64-setup.exe', './dist/MD Viewer Setup.exe'); fs.copyFileSync('./src-tauri/target/release/app.exe', './dist/MD Viewer.exe')"
scripts.dist: tauri build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('./src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/MD Viewer_1.0.0_x64-setup.exe', './dist/MD Viewer Setup.exe'); fs.copyFileSync('./src-tauri/target/release/app.exe', './dist/MD Viewer.exe')"

author: wassupbro
